title: Syrian Bulgur Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf made with bulgur, herbs, and spices. This dish is a staple in Syrian cuisine, often served alongside grilled meats.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add bulgur, salt, black pepper, and paprika. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff pilaf with a fork and stir in chopped parsley.
